positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for harry_queen_positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~has_backbone(X0) | reproduces_by_mating(X0)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    ~reproduces_by_mating(harry)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    bee(harry)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~vertebrate(X0) | ~invertebrate(X0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~vertebrate(X0) | has_backbone(X0)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    invertebrate(X0) | vertebrate(X0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    ~bee(X0) | ~reproduces_by_mating(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define queen_bee(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for harry_queen_negative
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~bee(X0) | ~reproduces_by_mating(X0)).

cnf(u23,negated_conjecture,
    queen_bee(harry)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    bee(harry)).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    ~reproduces_by_mating(harry)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    invertebrate(X0) | vertebrate(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~vertebrate(X0) | ~invertebrate(X0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~has_backbone(X0) | reproduces_by_mating(X0)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~vertebrate(X0) | has_backbone(X0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    ~queen_bee(X0) | bee(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
